languages.text: {n}Батошски пожимает плечами.{/n} "Тренировочный Бой не только про силу. Иногда соперники сами тебе победу отдают, если уважение имеешь. А глупый долго на своем месте все равно не протянет".

{n}Batoshski shrugs.{/n} "The Trial Match isn't just about brute force. Sometimes your rivals will hand you the win themselves if you've got their respect. And a fool won't last long in the post anyway."
languages.original_text: {n}Батошски пожимает плечами.{/n} "Тренировочный Бой не только про силу. Иногда соперники сами тебе победу отдают, если уважение имеешь. А глупый долго на своем месте все равно не протянет".

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski shrugs.{/n} "The Trial Match isn't just about brute force. Sometimes your rivals will hand you the win themselves if you've got their respect. And a fool won't last long in the post anyway."

{n}Batoshski shrugs.{/n} "The Trial Match isn't just about brute force. Sometimes your rivals will hand you the win themselves if you've got their respect. And a fool won't last long in the post anyway."
{n}Batoshski nods.{/n} "It is obvious to me and you. But I suppose no one ever thought about it before me."

{n}Batoshski shrugs.{/n} "The Trial Match isn't just about brute force. Sometimes your rivals will hand you the win themselves if you've got their respect. And a fool won't last long in the post anyway."

languages.text: {n}バトシュスキーはうなずく。{/n}「それは私にもあなたにも明白だ。だが、私より前にそれを考えた者はおそらくいないのだろう」
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski nods.{/n} "It is obvious to me and you. But I suppose no one ever thought about it before me."

traits.locale_text: {n}バトシュスキーはうなずく。{/n}「それは私にもあなたにも明白だ。だが、私より前にそれを考えた者はおそらくいないのだろう。」

languages.text: {n}Batoshski hausse les épaules.{/n} « L'Épreuve par les armes n'est pas qu'une question de force brute. Parfois, vos rivaux vous offriront d'eux-mêmes la victoire si vous parvenez à gagner leur respect. Et quoi qu'il arrive, un imbécile ne reste jamais en poste bien longtemps. »
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski shrugs.{/n} "The Trial Match isn't just about brute force. Sometimes your rivals will hand you the win themselves if you've got their respect. And a fool won't last long in the post anyway."

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski hausse les épaules.{/n} « L'Épreuve par les armes n'est pas qu'une question de force brute. Parfois, vos rivaux vous offriront d'eux-mêmes la victoire si vous parvenez à gagner leur respect. Et quoi qu'il arrive, un imbécile ne reste jamais en poste bien longtemps. »

languages.text: {n}Batoshski omuz silkiyor.{/n} "Sınav Karşılaşması'nda olay kaba kuvvette bitmez. Eğer saygılarını kazandıysan rakiplerin galibiyeti sana armağan eder. Zaten bir aptal, bu mevkide uzun süre barınamaz."
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski shrugs.{/n} "The Trial Match isn't just about brute force. Sometimes your rivals will hand you the win themselves if you've got their respect. And a fool won't last long in the post anyway."

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski omuz silkiyor.{/n} "Sınav Karşılaşması'nda olay kaba kuvvette bitmez. Eğer saygılarını kazandıysan rakiplerin galibiyeti sana armağan eder. Zaten bir aptal, bu mevkide uzun süre barınamaz."

languages.text: {n}Batoshski se encoge de hombros.{/n} «La prueba de combate no solo exige fuerza bruta. A veces los rivales se conceden la victoria por voluntad propia si alguno se gana el respeto de los demás. Y de todos modos, los patanes no suelen durar mucho en el cargo».
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski shrugs.{/n} "The Trial Match isn't just about brute force. Sometimes your rivals will hand you the win themselves if you've got their respect. And a fool won't last long in the post anyway."

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski se encoge de hombros.{/n} «La prueba de combate no solo exige fuerza bruta. A veces los rivales se conceden la victoria por voluntad propia si alguno se gana el respeto de los demás. Y de todos modos, los patanes no suelen durar mucho en el cargo».

languages.text: {n}巴托什斯基耸耸肩。{/n}“‘试炼比武’不只是靠蛮力。如果赢得了对手的尊重，他们有时甚至会自己认输。就算让一个傻子坐上了那个位置，也坐不长久。”
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski shrugs.{/n} "The Trial Match isn't just about brute force. Sometimes your rivals will hand you the win themselves if you've got their respect. And a fool won't last long in the post anyway."

traits.locale_text: {n}巴托什斯基耸耸肩。{/n}“‘试炼比武’不只是靠蛮力。如果赢得了对手的尊重，他们有时甚至会自己认输。就算让一个傻子坐上了那个位置，也坐不长久。”

languages.text: {n}Batoshski zuckt mit den Schultern.{/n} "Beim Prüfungskampf geht es nicht nur um brutale Gewalt. Ab und an überlassen Euch Eure Rivalen den Sieg, wenn Ihr Euch ihren Respekt verdient. Und ein Narr bleibt ohnehin nicht lange auf dem Posten."
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski shrugs.{/n} "The Trial Match isn't just about brute force. Sometimes your rivals will hand you the win themselves if you've got their respect. And a fool won't last long in the post anyway."
